overview.description: 3D product configurator platform with AI-powered Conversational UI for B2B2C e-commerce
overview.description_long: Founded in Prague in 2010, Salsita is a team of 50+ designers and engineers dedicated to creating 3D and 2D product configurators for B2B2C e-commerce. The company pivoted from web/mobile development into the configurator space around 2020, specialising in 3D configurators, room planners, augmented reality, and AI-driven solutions. Salsita claims to have built the world's first and only Conversational Configurator — combining a 3D product configurator with a generative AI assistant that guides customers through customisation in natural language. Industries served include home and office furniture, outdoor living, construction equipment, jewellery, luxury goods, retail, and e-commerce.
overview.tagline: Salsita Empowers Businesses to Deliver Exceptional Customer Experiences and Drive Real Results

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2010 as a web and mobile applications agency working with clients like eBay, SAP, and Balfour. About five years ago (c. 2020) pivoted into the 3D/2D product configurator space, specialising in e-commerce personalisation. Rebranded from salsitasoft.com to salsita.ai in late 2023.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague as a web/mobile development agency
Pivoted into 3D/2D product configurators and e-commerce AI
Launched Conversational Configurator (claimed world's first); rebranded to salsita.ai
Expanded office footprint to Prague, Ostrava, and Atlanta

awards: SoftwareWorld Top Rated App Development Company

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core 3D configurator product involves significant visual computing and integration work that generic LLMs cannot directly replicate. However, the Conversational UI layer is a thin wrapper over generative AI APIs, which is easily commoditised. The proprietary value lies in the 3D rendering technology, UX expertise, and deep industry integrations built over 15 years.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: 3D product configurators for e-commerce represent a real and growing market driven by mass-personalisation trends. Salsita has 1000+ completed client projects and named enterprise customers (eBay, SAP, Texas Instruments), demonstrating proven demand and product-market fit.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No external funding found; company appears to be bootstrapped. However, 15+ years of profitable operation with a broad client base (1000+ projects) and offices in three cities suggests sustainable revenues. Lack of growth capital may limit speed of AI investment.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Long-established company with a real product and paying enterprise customers, but the AI wrapper portion of their Conversational Configurator faces commoditisation risk. Bootstrapped status limits ability to rapidly outpace better-funded configurator competitors (Threekit, Zakeke, Expivi).

metadata.notes: Company website (salsita.ai) is built on Squarespace with JavaScript-rendered content; text extracted via Wayback Machine snapshots. Originally operated as salsitasoft.com. Legal name: Salsita, s.r.o. GitHub org at github.com/salsita has 147 public repos. The company self-describes as 'a high-end software development agency' and also as a product company — they straddle both custom services and a SaaS configurator platform.
